---
title: "Photos — 2025"
---

A few snapshots from the Lodge. (Drop image files into `2025/photos/` and add
them to the gallery below.)

::: {layout-ncol=3}
![Welcome reception](photos/placeholder.svg){group="2025"}

![Morning session](photos/placeholder.svg){group="2025"}

![Coffee break](photos/placeholder.svg){group="2025"}

![Conference dinner](photos/placeholder.svg){group="2025"}

![Poster session](photos/placeholder.svg){group="2025"}

![Group photo](photos/placeholder.svg){group="2025"}
:::
